case_title: DAVE'S GOURMET, INC. VS CARTER, MARY et al

docket_entries.description: COPY OF ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SC-105A) WAS SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY DAVE'S GOURMET, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CARTER, MARY JAZZ FOODS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-25-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE RE CHALLENGE OF VENUE SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2007 ORDERED DESTROYED
DEFT'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE, FILED. $10.00 FEE PAID.
DETF'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE SUBMITTED TO COMMISSIONER FOR APPROVAL.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-30-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-28-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUANCE REQUEST BY DEFT. PRE ARRANGED TRAVEL.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAVE'S GOURMET, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CARTER, MARY JAZZ FOODS DEFENDANT MARY CARTER DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-25-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-30-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 DEFENDANT'S VENUE CHALLENGE DENIED. CASE CONTINUE TO AUG. 30, 2007 @ 8:30 AM.
REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER, FILED BY DEFT. COPIES SENT TO PARTIES WITH ANSWER FORM.
DEFT'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE RETURNED WITH SC110 FORM (REQUEST TO POSTPONE) AND INFORMED OF THE $10 FEE.
